title: Cloud Revive
description: Makes your stuff extremely safe when you die, turns mortality into a resource.
body:
# Cloud Revive

For Now:

_**Supported Languages**:  简体中文 / 繁體中文 / English_

_**Supported Versions**: 1.21.1 / 1.20.1_

_**Supported Loaders**: Fabric / Neoforge / Forge_ 

**Note: Recommend to play with [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) !And Neoforge Version (<1.1.0) requires [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api) !**

###  **Important! This mod is in beta! Please select the latest version to play!**
## 👓 Main

> Once players die , their **"Wandering Spirits"** spawn. 

![Wandering Spirit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76a95e5ec84b39aa857c7a9dbefcc8f1ef557fcc_0.webp)

This picture shows different spirits:
- Players' Wandering Spirits will glow for a while when they are summoned. They have their owners' **belongings** in their inventories. 
  
  They will search, interact, and even talk to their owners. 
  
  Don't worry, they won't leave death point unless their owners are nearby.

- Wandering spirits that are naturally spawned will not glow, and they will not interact with anything. 
  
  They will only be **decorative**.
  
> Tip: Wandering spirits won't be hurt by any means, including damage from vanilla commands and void.

> Also, spirits do not cause any collisions.

To take your items back from spirits, you will need a _"Chaos Soul Cage"_.

- You will need to collect many items. The process won't take long, though.

- _**You'll find the collections helpful later on.**_
## 🪄 Additioinal
**In-game guides can be very helpful, Use them wisely!**

![In-game tips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0024257b24f1da19a955be29664bede5c34b7ad_0.webp)

The mod adds various blocks, items, and a very helpful enchantment _"Soul Bind"_. Use these features to make the game easier, and you won't find **death** as painful.

![Mod Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/480c827fdb3b05a449581fd64fc255ff3b60f620.png)

## ✨ Compatibility
### Fabric Version
Will also handle items in slots provided by [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)
and [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories).

You can put the "Soul Bind" enchantment on **backpacks** provided by [Backpacked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked),[Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) and [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack).

### Neoforge/Forge Version
Will also handle items in slots provided by [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) and [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories).

Also, you can put the "Soul Bind" enchantment on **backpacks** provided by [Backpacked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked) , [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) and [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack).

## ♣️ Others

1.Versions for older Minecraft versions might be released in the future.

2.There will be no release for **forge 1.21.X**.

3.The Wiki is under construction.

**Have fun gaming! :D**
